_format.note: Patient-file prose for the dossier and battle log. Inline markup: ~~strike~~ for double-strike, [[N]] for an N-char redaction bar, **gold** for the gold accent (rare, on quietly charged words), !!text!! for blood-red text (warnings, refusals, the most charged moments). All prose is sentence case. Patient names appear in [brackets] in the templates. Subtitles + notes are written as institutional patient files in third-person clinical voice (she/he/they/it as fits each patient). Ability flavor + use/hit lines + passive voice prose use neutral they/them since these can transfer between creatures via breeding.
_format.lookup: Dossier reads: subtitles[species] || subtitles[type]; notes[species] || notes[type]. Battle log reads: actions[abilityKey].use || actionDefaults[element].use; same for hit/flavor. effectDefaults[kind] is consulted when an ability has no damage. afflictions[statusKey].apply / .tick are read on apply / per-turn-tick. noteAppends[species][wave] is appended to the species' notes for waves <= state.wave (currently used only by the protagonist, species 'Lumenpup').
_format.templates: {actor} = name of the doer. {target} = name of the receiver. {name} = ability display name. {status} = affliction name.

subtitles.water: Subject is wet through. The room is dry.
subtitles.grass: Subject grows in here. It should not.
subtitles.light: Subject lights what is around it. Not warmly.
subtitles.dark: Subject is hard to look at. Staff prefer not to.
subtitles.Ashmaw: She has not stopped eating since admission.
subtitles.Cinderling: The rest of the family was indoors.
subtitles.Magmaw: He says it was already open.
subtitles.Soothlick: Other patients have stopped reporting it.
subtitles.Charnel: She did not stop when staff approached.
subtitles.Tidewhelp: His brother insists it is him.
subtitles.Rivergeist: She is found in the same hallway each time.
subtitles.Brineback: He brought it in himself. We took it from him.
subtitles.Mireling: There is no pond on the grounds.
subtitles.Coralhusk: She responds to her name. Nothing else.
subtitles.Frostfin: She was found on the bench after.
subtitles.Deepmaw: Staff are reminded not to go down.
subtitles.Vinewyrm: She refuses to use the legs.
subtitles.Bloomback: He says it is **growing in nicely**.
subtitles.Hollowoak: She is sure she had a daughter.
subtitles.Aurabeast: He used to work in records.
subtitles.Halowyrm: Staff use less light in her ward.
subtitles.Glimmerfox: He was eight. He doesn't blink.
subtitles.Shadowmaw: He has been quoting us back.
subtitles.Nightcreep: Whoever brought her did not sign in.
subtitles.Wraithfin: She insists she is the other one.
subtitles.Umbragale: She draws it on the wall every morning.

fire: Staff use insulated grips. Family ask if she is in pain.
water: Subject leaves a wet trail. The trail does not evaporate.
Staff have begun to dream of ~~drowning~~ being underneath.
grass: Has been here longer than ~~records~~ files indicate.
light: Subject is luminous in low light.
Staff have begun closing one eye when checking on her.
Reports of headaches in adjacent wards. **Several.**
dark: Subject is photographed only with difficulty.
Patient does not face the camera.
Orderlies prefer to enter in pairs.
Emberkin: Subject is the size of a six-month-old. ~~Fever.~~ Cold to the touch.
Staff have not informed her [[12]]. She has not asked.
Asked when *it* could leave. Corrected herself. !!She meant herself.!!
Ashmaw: Subject has consumed everything offered. She continues to ask.
Found chewing on the bedframe. ~~Iron filings~~ flecks recovered from her mouth.
Asked when she was last full. !!She does not remember being.!!
Cinderling: Subject was located on the porch. Smoke damage minor.
Patient was eight. The rest of the family was indoors.
Refers to her brother in present tense. ~~**I** answer when she calls.~~
Pyrelord: Subject occupies the room as if it remains his.
Family report he has been deceased since ~~1986~~ longer.
Magmaw: Subject sits with one ear toward the corridor.
Patient was a property surveyor. He insists the door was already open.
Asked what was beyond. ~~He described it.~~ The page is missing.
Soothlick: Patient was a night nurse for ~~thirty~~ thirty-eight years.
Found in other patients' rooms after lights-out. She does not turn the door handle.
Patients she has tended report **sleeping better**. They do not wake all the way.
Charnel: Subject was observed approaching the entrance for [[3]] days.
She walked the length of the road. The road is not paved.
Has not sat down since admission. ~~Refuses.~~ Cannot.
Tidewhelp: Subject was returned to family after [[5]] missing.
The brother says it is him. The brother is sure.
Does not eat what the family eats. ~~Will not.~~ Does not appear to need to.
Rivergeist: Patient has attempted to leave the ward seventeen times this week.
Each attempt ends in the east hallway. She does not remember the others.
Asked where she was going. Answered: !!the same place she came from.!!
Brineback: Subject was wrapped in linens when delivered to admissions.
Patient's husband brought it in. He has been here since.
He asks after it daily. We tell him she is ~~comfortable~~ kept.
Mireling: Patient asks staff about the pond on the grounds. There is no pond.
She specifies a ~~stone~~ statue at the edge. None on file.
Family report she put **something** in a pond, once. They will not say what.
Coralhusk: Subject responds when called by her given name.
No further verbal output observed in [[3]] months.
Family ask if she is still in there. We **say yes**.
Frostfin: Patient was located on the bench outside the train station.
She had been there since her ~~husband~~ son said he would come.
Her hands have not warmed since. **Staff do not hold them long.**
Deepmaw: Subject is housed below the main wards by request. Not hers.
Staff entering the lower level are required to ~~sign out~~ pair up.
She has not been observed eating. The orderlies are losing weight.
Loamback: Patient has been awaiting transfer to [[7]] since 1981.
She does not ask after it. She knows the number she is.
When called by another's name, she ~~corrects~~ accepts it.
Sproutkin: Subject has reopened the same wound eleven times.
The bandage is replaced daily. She thanks staff. She **cannot help.**
When asked why, she answered: ~~it is healing wrong~~ it is healing.
Mosshorn: Patient has not initiated movement since 1972.
Subject was in bed at 22:00. Subject was at the window at 06:00.
Staff present that night ~~do not~~ will not say.
Vinewyrm: Subject is fully ambulatory. Refuses to walk.
Patient was found in the south corridor. She had crawled from the east. **It took the night.**
When stood up by orderlies, she ~~sits~~ lowers herself.
Bloomback: Subject is observed cultivating something within the wound.
He prunes it. He calls it by !!plant names!!.
Smells of [[8]] when the room is closed.
Thornling: Patient is small. She is mostly compliant.
Three orderlies have lost ~~fingers~~ partial use of the right hand.
She apologizes after. !!It does not appear to help her.!!
Hollowoak: Patient cannot recall the name of ~~her daughter~~ the one she came in with.
She has been told the room next door is empty. She continues to thank the staff for *the visits*.
When asked her own name, she gave the orderly's. ~~**I** told her it was hers.~~
Lumenpup: Subject arrived at the front entrance unaccompanied. No identification provided.
Vitals normal. Responds to questions. !!Does not remember the address.!!
Aurabeast: Patient was a records clerk for thirty-one years.
He continues to take notes. The page is blank.
Staff have begun to !!find their words!! in his hand.
Dawnstag: His mother is housed two doors down. She does not know him.
He was named after his ~~grandfather~~ uncle. The uncle is also here.
Halowyrm: Subject emits visible light from the chest cavity.
Lights in her ward are kept dim. ~~For her~~ for the staff.
Family ask what is in there. We have **not** said.
Glimmerfox: Patient was eight when it ran into the road.
He watched. The rest of the family looked away. He ~~has not~~ cannot stop.
Subject sits at his feet. He pets it. **It has been forty years.**
Shadowmaw: Patient occupies the room nearest the staff lounge.
He has begun returning to staff what they spoke of yesterday.
He uses our names. !!We are not sure when he learned them.!!
Voidling: Patient sealed it in his bedroom closet for thirty-six years.
At admission it was smaller than a fist. !!It has grown since.!!
He calls it by ~~his wife's~~ the name they would have given.
Nightcreep: Subject was logged at the front desk after hours.
Whoever brought her did not sign in. They left her in the chair.
She refuses to identify them. ~~Or cannot.~~ The chair is !!still warm!!.
Wraithfin: Patient was admitted alone. She insists she is the other one.
Her sister's death certificate is on file. ~~Her~~ the patient's signature is on it.
When asked who she is, she answers her sister's name. !!Each time. The same.!!
Umbragale: Patient draws the same house every morning. Same windows. Same number on the door.
She insists it ~~comes~~ has come for her.
The address she gave matches no facility on record. The house !!is at the address!!.

Lumenpup.3: Has begun referring to the south corridor as *home*.
Lumenpup.6: Asked about the room they were admitted with. There is no such room. There never was.
Lumenpup.9: Has stopped responding to designation 0413. !!Responds to 0412.!! Room 0413 now **vacant again.**

passives.brutal: They do not measure how hard.
passives.swift: They were not where the blow was.
passives.thick_hide: They arrived heavier than admission noted.
passives.iron_grip: Once they have hold of a thing.
passives.glass_cannon: They are given. ~~Nothing~~ Little kept back.
passives.stone_skin: Small things do not appear in the file.
passives.bulwark: Indifferent strikes do not remember them.
passives.inferno_heart: Something hotter has been kept inside them.
passives.tide_blessed: The wet does not leave them.
passives.verdant_soul: Whatever they eat becomes green again.
passives.sunforged: They were hammered out of a kinder room.
passives.shadowforged: Hammered out of a place the light did not reach.
passives.predators_edge: They know where the page is thin.
passives.tempo: They keep a count staff cannot follow.
passives.lightbearer: They walk a step before their own light.
passives.cornered: They are worse when they cannot leave.
passives.pristine: Subject has not yet been ~~touched~~ filed.
passives.photosynthesis: They do not eat. The window is enough.
passives.soul_drain: Each strike returns smaller to them.
passives.vampire_touch: What is given to them, they take more of.
passives.aquaveil: The room rearranges to keep them.
passives.second_wind: They rise once they have been called.
passives.warm_blood: Fevering does not take in them.
passives.riposte: They return what is given. Smaller.
passives.iron_will: The marks do not stay on them.
passives.hex_eater: What is laid on them, they finish.
passives.featherweight: They arrive where the others were going.
passives.spite: They do not stop when they are finished.
passives.reflective_aura: What was meant for them finds the sender.
passives.counterstance: They do not move until struck.
passives.frostbite: Where they touch, the room grows slower.
passives.poisonous: They leave something in every wound.
passives.curse_weaver: Their voice names. The named forget how to act.
passives.status_lord: Each mark they leave makes the next deeper.
passives.vanguard: They enter before staff can prepare them.
passives.sentinel: They tend the bench when not on the floor.
passives.tag_out: They take the marks with them when they go.
passives.rearguard: Behind, they are watching for the others.
passives.pivot_master: They slip the names laid on them.
passives.spotter: They watch the bench and quiet the marks there.
passives.twin_soul: Whatever happens to them, the bench feels half of.
passives.dark_pact: They paid in admission. The strength is theirs now.
passives.mortal_coil: When they are finishing, they are also beginning.
passives.slow_burn: They are warmer in the third hour. And the fourth.
passives.berserker: They refuse care. !!It works for them.!!
passives.doubling_down: When the blow lands, it lands again.
passives.misty_form: They are where staff do not expect.
passives.eldritch_sight: Type does not apply to them. ~~Yet they apply.~~
passives.reckless_heart: What they give, they do not feel as much.
passives.zealot: They are convinced. The blow follows.
passives.patient_hunter: They do not move first. They do not need to.
passives.scavenger: What others gather, they find later.
passives.echo_form: Whatever the room said last, they say again.
passives.dreadful: Subjects who see them at admission **lose weight**.
passives.prepared: They have read the file before staff did.
passives.serene: They do not register the dose.
passives.lucky: What is meant to miss them does. Except when it does not.
passives.savage: When they find it, they finish it.

inferno.use: {actor} releases {name}. The room cannot hold it.

self_immolate.use: {actor} uses {name}. They feed it from their own.

surge.hit: {target} cannot tell where the room ends.

bramble.use: {actor} uses {name}. Where they touch, it grows.

spore_cloud.use: {actor} uses {name}. They open what was held.

radiance.use: {actor} uses {name}. They turn the light on what is on them.

sunbeam.use: {actor} uses {name}. Light gathers along their hand.

shadow_step.use: {actor} uses {name}. They are no longer where they were.
shadow_step.hit: The blow lands as they leave.

mend.use: {actor} uses {name}. They bandage what is open.

tactical_retreat.use: {actor} uses {name}. The bench takes the next blow.

events.swap_in: {actor} comes forward to take the floor.
events.swap_curse: The break takes from {actor} on the way out.
